items.question: About what share of international migrants were female in 2024, per the UN overview?
items.explanation: The UN migration page reports female migrants as 48 per cent of the total in 2024.

items.question: According to the UN’s international migration overview, about how many international migrants were there worldwide in 2024?
items.explanation: UNDESA Population Division figures cited by the UN place the 2024 global migrant stock at about 304 million.

items.question: For UN statistics, who counts as an international migrant?
items.correctAnswer: any person who has changed his or her country of residence
items.explanation: The UN migration page defines an international migrant, for statistical purposes, as someone who changed country of residence.

items.question: In which year did IOM enter into an agreement to become a United Nations–related organization?
items.explanation: The UN migration page notes the 2016 agreement making IOM a related organization of the UN.

items.question: International Migrants Day is observed on which date each year?
items.explanation: The UN proclaimed 18 December as International Migrants Day.

items.question: International migrants made up about what share of the global population in 2024?
items.explanation: The UN migration page states migrants were about 3.7 per cent of the global population in 2024.

items.question: The International Organization for Migration (IOM) was established in which year?
items.explanation: The UN migration overview states IOM was established in 1951.

items.question: The intergovernmental conference that adopted the Global Compact for Migration was held in which city?
items.explanation: The UN migration page places the adopting conference in Marrakesh, Morocco.

items.question: The same UN overview estimates about how many international migrants there were worldwide in 1990?
items.explanation: The UN migration page cites roughly 154 million international migrants in 1990.

items.question: UN Member States adopted the Global Compact for Safe, Orderly and Regular Migration in which month and year?
items.explanation: The UN migration overview dates adoption of the Global Compact for Migration to December 2018.

items.question: Which Sustainable Development Goal target explicitly calls for orderly, safe, regular, and responsible migration?
items.explanation: The UN migration page links SDG target 10.7 to well-managed migration policies.
